sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3524" key="a)krobeli/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρ-οβελίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὀβελός</etym>) <sense id="n3524.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">point of dart</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0417.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n3524.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εἶδος ἀκοντίου</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
